### Checklist

- [ ] Directory: `skills/<name>/SKILL.toml`
- [ ] `name` in TOML matches directory name
- [ ] `author` set to my GitHub handle
- [ ] All external calls use HTTPS
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] `prompts` explains when to use each tool
- [ ] Tested locally (skill loads, tools callable)
- [ ] Version bumped if updating an existing skill
